## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Documentation updated (if public API changed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (if user-facing)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy src/` passes
- [ ] Hot path performance verified (if modifying `_capture`, `_sanitize`, `_serialize`, `_storage`)
- [ ] Security review completed (if modifying `_sanitize` or `_capture`)
- [ ] Self-review completed
